member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IChainNode
member.summary: Executes a single step in a route's execution chain. Returns either Continue (to execute next node) or Stop (to short-circuit).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IChainNode.ExecuteAsync(JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute this chain node. Return ChainResult.Next() to continue, or ChainResult.Stop(response) to short-circuit.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteConstraint
member.summary: Custom constraint for validating route parameters.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validate the parameter value. Return true if it matches the constraint, false otherwise.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteProvider
member.summary: Provides route definitions from any source (code, database, config, etc.).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteProvider.GetRoutesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Return all routes from this provider. Called during router initialization and reload.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouter
member.summary: The main router interface. Matches requests to routes and executes them.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouter.HandleRequestAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handle an HTTP request and return a RouteResult.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouter.ReloadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reload routes from all providers. Atomic trie swap, zero downtime.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouter.RegisterRouteAsync(JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a single route (primarily for testing).

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteWrapper
member.summary: Wraps route execution with before/after hooks. Used sparingly for use cases that genuinely need both before and after logic (timing, error handling, etc.).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteWrapper.WrapAsync(JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask{JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Wraps the route execution. The function executes the actual route.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.ChainResult
member.summary: Result of a chain node execution. Either continue to the next node, or short-circuit with a response. Immutable readonly struct.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.ChainResult.Continue
member.summary: If true, execution continues to the next chain node or handler. If false, execution short-circuits and the response is returned.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.ChainResult.Response
member.summary: The response to return if Continue is false. Null if Continue is true.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.ChainResult.Next
member.summary: Creates a result that continues to the next node.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.ChainResult.Stop(JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult)
member.summary: Creates a result that short-circuits with the specified response.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.IntConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is a valid 32-bit integer.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.IntConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value can be parsed as an integer.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.LongConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is a valid 64-bit integer.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.LongConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value can be parsed as a long.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.GuidConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is a valid GUID.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.GuidConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value can be parsed as a GUID.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.BoolConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is a valid boolean (true/false).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.BoolConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value can be parsed as a boolean.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.SlugConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is URL-friendly: lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. No regex — implemented as a Span loop.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.SlugConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value is a valid slug (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only).

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.AlphaConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value contains letters only (a-z, A-Z).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.AlphaConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value contains only letters.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.AlphanumConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value contains letters and numbers only.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.AlphanumConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value contains only letters and numbers.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.FilenameConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is a URL-safe filename. Allows letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and dots.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.FilenameConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value is a valid filename (no leading/trailing dots, safe characters only).

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.LengthConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value string length is within the specified range (inclusive). Usage: {name:length(2,50)}

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.LengthConstraint.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a length constraint with the specified minimum and maximum string lengths (inclusive).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.LengthConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value string length is within the specified range.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RangeConstraint
member.summary: Validates that a parameter value is an integer within a specified range (inclusive). Usage: {page:range(1,100)}

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RangeConstraint.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a range constraint with the specified minimum and maximum values (inclusive).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RangeConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value is an integer within the specified range.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RegexConstraint
M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RegexConstraint.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a regex constraint with the specified pattern. Pattern is compiled and cached.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Constraints.RegexConstraint.Match(System.String,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates that the value matches the regex pattern.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering the WebKit router middleware.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.ApplicationBuilderExtensions.UseWebKitRouter(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder)
member.summary: Use the WebKit router middleware.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for mapping routes fluently.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingExtensions.MapRoute(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.String,JG.WebKit.Router.RouteHandler)
member.summary: Register a route with the static route provider.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingExtensions.MapRouteGroup(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.IApplicationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder})
member.summary: Register a route group with shared prefix and chain nodes.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for configuring individual routes.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.#ctor(JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition)
member.summary: Initializes a new RouteMappingBuilder.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.AddChainNode(JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IChainNode)
member.summary: Add a chain node to this route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.AddChainNode``1
member.summary: Add a chain node of type T to this route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.AddWrapper(JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IRouteWrapper)
member.summary: Add a wrapper to this route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.AddWrapper``1
member.summary: Add a wrapper of type T to this route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.WithMetadata(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Add metadata to this route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.RequireAuth
member.summary: Mark this route as requiring authentication.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteMappingBuilder.RequireRateLimit
member.summary: Mark this route as requiring rate limiting.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for route groups.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder.#ctor(System.String,JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.StaticRouteProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new RouteGroupBuilder.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder.AddChainNode(JG.WebKit.Router.Abstractions.IChainNode)
member.summary: Add a chain node to all routes in this group.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder.AddChainNode``1
member.summary: Add a chain node of type T to all routes in this group.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.RouteGroupBuilder.MapRoute(System.String,System.String,JG.WebKit.Router.RouteHandler)
member.summary: Register a route within this group.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.WebKitRouterServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Service collection extension for registering the WebKit router.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.WebKitRouterServiceCollectionExtensions.AddWebKitRouter(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions})
member.summary: Register the WebKit router with the dependency injection container.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.WebKitRouterServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRouteProvider``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Register a route provider.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Extensions.WebKitRouterServiceCollectionExtensions.AddRouteConstraint``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Register a custom route constraint. Call this before AddWebKitRouter.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.RouterLogMessages
member.summary: Source-generated logging messages for the WebKit router.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.SegmentParser
member.summary: Parses a route path segment and extracts parameter name and constraint. Example: "{id:int}" → name="id", constraint="int" Example: "{name}" → name="name", constraint=null (unconstrained) Example: "{**path}" → name="path", constraint="wildcard"

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.SegmentParser.ParsedSegment
member.summary: Represents a parsed segment.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.SegmentParser.Parse(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Parses a route segment. Returns a ParsedSegment with name and constraint.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.SegmentParser.IsOptional(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Check if a segment is optional (ends with '?').

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieBuilder
member.summary: Builds and manages the route trie. Thread-safe: hot-reload via atomic trie swap with Interlocked.Exchange.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieBuilder.BuildTrie(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition})
member.summary: Build a trie from a list of route definitions.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieBuilder.Match(JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Match a request against the trie and extract parameters.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode
member.summary: Immutable trie node for route matching. Each node can have literal, constrained param, unconstrained param, and wildcard children.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode.Literals
member.summary: Literal segment children (exact string match, O(1) lookup).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode.ConstrainedParams
member.summary: Constrained parameter children. (ParamName with constraint key, Constraint key, Actual param name, TrieNode)

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode.UnconstrainedParam
member.summary: Unconstrained parameter child (single, first match wins).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode.Wildcard
member.summary: Wildcard/catch-all parameter child (matches remaining segments).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieNode.Routes
member.summary: Routes registered at this node, keyed by HTTP method.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.CompiledRoute
member.summary: Compiled route with pre-built chain nodes and handler. Executed when a route matches.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.CompiledRoute.ExecuteAsync(JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute this compiled route with all chain nodes and wrappers.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.TrieMatchResult
member.summary: Result of route matching.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer
member.summary: Handles URL normalization: trailing slash, case sensitivity, and path segment extraction. All operations are allocation-free when feasible.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.NormalizePath(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Normalize a path: handle trailing slash and case sensitivity. Returns the normalized path.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.SplitPathSegments(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Split a path into segments using ReadOnlySpan (minimal allocation). Empty segments are skipped.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.HasTrailingSlash(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a path has a trailing slash.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.ToggleTrailingSlash(System.String)
member.summary: Get the URL with trailing slash added or removed.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.DecodeSegment(System.String)
member.summary: Decode a URL-encoded path segment.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.UrlNormalizer.EncodeSegment(System.String)
member.summary: Encode a path segment for URL usage.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter
member.summary: Main router implementation. Matches requests to routes via trie and executes compiled chains. Hot-reload via atomic trie swap with Interlocked.Exchange.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initialize the router by loading routes from all providers.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter.HandleRequestAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handle an HTTP request: normalize URL, match route, execute chain, return result.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter.ReloadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reload routes from all providers. Atomic trie swap, zero downtime.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter.RegisterRouteAsync(JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Register a single route for testing.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Internal.WebKitRouter.GetCurrentTrie
member.summary: Get the current trie for testing.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.StaticRouteProvider
member.summary: Provides routes defined in code via MapRoute() calls.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.StaticRouteProvider.AddRoute(JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition)
member.summary: Add a static route.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.StaticRouteProvider.GetRoutesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all routes registered in this provider.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.ConfigurationRouteProvider
M:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.ConfigurationRouteProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a new ConfigurationRouteProvider that reads routes from the specified IConfiguration instance.
member.param: The configuration instance to read routes from.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.Providers.ConfigurationRouteProvider.GetRoutesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads and returns all routes from the configuration.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext
member.summary: Context passed to chain nodes and route handlers during execution. Immutable readonly struct containing the HTTP context and matched route information.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext.HttpContext
member.summary: The ASP.NET Core HttpContext for this request.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext.Match
member.summary: The matched route information including parameters.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext.RouteMetadata
member.summary: Route metadata (e.g., cache_ttl, layout, permissions).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RequestContext.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext,JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Creates a new RequestContext with the specified HttpContext, route match, and metadata.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition
member.summary: Defines a single HTTP route with its method, path, handler, and constraints.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.Method
member.summary: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.Path
member.summary: Route path template (e.g., "/api/users/{id:int}").

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.Handler
member.summary: The handler to execute when this route matches.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.Metadata
member.summary: Optional route metadata (e.g., cache_ttl, layout, permissions).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.ChainNodes
member.summary: Optional chain nodes to execute before the handler.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteDefinition.Wrappers
member.summary: Optional wrappers that provide before/after execution hooks.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteHandler
member.summary: Delegate for executing a route handler and returning a RouteResult.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch
member.summary: Represents a matched route with extracted parameters and metadata.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch.Method
member.summary: HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.) that matched.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch.Path
member.summary: Route path template that matched.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch.Parameters
member.summary: Extracted route parameters (e.g., {id} values).

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteMatch.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Creates a new RouteMatch with the specified method, path, and parameters.
member.param: The route path template that matched.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult
member.summary: Represents the result of route matching and execution. Immutable, stack-allocated readonly struct with zero GC pressure.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code for the response.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Body
member.summary: Response body. Can be null, string, or any serializable object.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Indicates whether the response represents a successful HTTP status (2xx).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Headers
member.summary: Optional HTTP response headers.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Ok(System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a successful 200 OK response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Json(System.Object,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a JSON response with the specified body and status code.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Html(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an HTML response with the specified HTML content.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Redirect(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a redirect response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.NotFound(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a 404 Not Found response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Unauthorized(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a 401 Unauthorized response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Forbidden(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a 403 Forbidden response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.TooManyRequests(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a 429 Too Many Requests response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.BadRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a 400 Bad Request response.

member.name: M:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteResult.Error(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error response with the specified status code.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions
member.summary: Configuration options for the WebKit router.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions.EnableTrailingSlashRedirect
member.summary: If true, URLs ending with a slash will be redirected to non-slash version (or vice versa). Default: false (silent normalization).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions.CaseSensitive
member.summary: If true, route matching is case-sensitive. Default: false.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions.ConflictPolicy
member.summary: Policy for handling route conflicts (duplicate routes).

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions.RespectProxyHeaders
member.summary: If true, proxy headers (X-Forwarded-*) are respected for URL reconstruction.

member.name: P:JG.WebKit.Router.RouterOptions.MaxCompiledRegexCache
member.summary: Maximum number of cached regex patterns per constraint type. Default: 100.

member.name: T:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteConflictPolicy
member.summary: Policy for handling route conflicts.

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteConflictPolicy.ThrowOnConflict
member.summary: Throw an exception when duplicate routes are detected.

member.name: F:JG.WebKit.Router.RouteConflictPolicy.LastWins
member.summary: Use the last registered route and silently ignore earlier duplicates.
